text.title: vision-agentic-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-agentic-pipeline as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sending file metadata (EXIF, PDF author, creation date) expectations to the vision extraction agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: VLMs cannot see file metadata — agents expecting metadata from vision calls will get nothing. Use PyMuPDF or Pillow for metadata extraction separately from the VLM call.

failure-mode.description: Running VLM extraction synchronously in a web request handler for batch document uploads.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Single-threaded VLM calls at 1-2s each block the web worker. Move to async batch processing with a task queue (Celery, arq) — the response to the user is a job ID, not the extraction result.
